summary: The ACCC has approved Zurich Financial Services' takeover of ClearView Wealth, with Zurich offering 65 cents per share, valuing the deal at approximately $200 million.
author: KARREN VERGARA
heading: Life Insurance
key_points: Zurich Financial Services is acquiring ClearView Wealth.
The offer is 65 cents per ClearView share.
The total value of the takeover is about $200 million.
